title: stelis choriantha
intro: Stelis choriantha, also known as the orchid bee orchid, is a rare and endangered species of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis choriantha include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Stelis choriantha is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
